summary:
I found the needle! 

**The bug:** The nginx configuration was proxying to port 5001, but the Flask server runs on port 5000.

**The fix:** Changed `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` to `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;` in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`.

The test now passes with all checks verified.
